description: Style Note  Structured tee from puma for the summer - you can't get cooler (literally and figuratively) than this. Play up the brand's sporty vibe and style this with slim cut cotton trousers and a washed leather jacket. Match the colour of the trousers with the jacket (keep it tonal) and pair this with a no-fuss style pair of sneakers. Product Details Black T-shirt, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, Puma cat print on the chest and branding at the back below the neckline Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold  Tumble dry low  Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M Style NoteStructured tee from Puma for the summer - you can't get cooler (literally and figuratively) than this. Play up the brand's sporty vibe and style this with slim cut cotton trousers and a washed leather jacket.
